top_signals.title: Revolut pays compensation for waking customer up with push notifications
top_signals.summary: The Treasury might be hoping to ease the Financial Ombudsman Service’s workload but there has been no slowdown in perplexing cases. In this week’s column, Samuel Norman tells the tale of Revolut and a sleep-starved customer.    Is there an inappropriate time for a push notification?  There is, according to one bank customer. Revolut found itself [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
